sentences: Then, these query embeddings are passed through the fully connected layer (dynamic filters) as follows:
Finally, cross-attention between features and object queries is performed with 1 × 1 convolution using dynamic filters <MATH_104>
These features are passed through <ENT_081> layers to provide various predictions as updated object-embedding, updated box-encoding, and the object class.
This process eases the learning of the cross-attention module by focusing on sparse areas and then spreading to global regions.
